name: Hot Oniony Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice fresh mushrooms so that they are approximately 1/4 inch thick.
2. In a large skillet add the mushrooms, water, Tabasco sauce, garlic, onion, Italian seasoning, and cayenne pepper. Cover and bring to a boil, stirring occasionally.
3. Boil for about 5 minutes. Uncover the pan and let simmer until most of the water has evaporated, leaving a paste at the bottom of the pan.
